title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models for chat, tools, and embeddings.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs entirely in browser.

title: ollama-hass
summary: Home Assistant custom component exposing Ollama as a conversation agent.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI with fzf-powered model picker, chat history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper around Ollama’s REST API with async/await and native JSON marshalling.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: Community-maintained .NET SDK for Ollama supporting chat, embed, and pull operations.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, generate flashcards, or brainstorm with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Self-hosted Telegram bot that chats with any Ollama model; supports group threads and voice.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library generated from OpenAPI specs; idiomatic streams and context cancellation.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Curated collection of Modelfile recipes (Llama 3, Phi-3, CodeLlama, etc.) maintained by Ollama team.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for private or channel-wide LLM conversations.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama models to servers with context per channel and moderation hooks.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate on crates.io providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama as an async chat/embedding backend with admin UI.
